title: Add /login and /register API endpoints
description: Create Next.js route handlers at POST /api/auth/login and POST /api/auth/register that delegate to the existing login/register functions in src/api/auth/. The login endpoint should validate credentials and return JWT tokens; the register endpoint should create a user and return JWT tokens. Both must use getPayloadInstance() for Payload and JwtService for token generation.
existing_patterns: src/app/api/enroll/route.ts — Next.js route handler pattern using withAuth wrapper and getPayloadInstance()
src/api/auth/login.ts — login function to delegate to (email/password validation, JWT generation via JwtService)
src/api/auth/register.ts — register function to delegate to (email format, password strength, duplicate check, user creation)
src/auth/jwt-service.ts — JwtService for signAccessToken (15min) and signRefreshToken (7 days)
